title: psychotria nervosa subsp. rufescens
intro: Psychotria nervosa subsp. rufescens, also known as Rufescens or Wild Yam, is a perennial plant native to Central and South America, and the southern United States. It is a member of the Rubiaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Rufescens include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. Rufescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried root powder, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
